name: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-khubthi wal-khaba'ith
meaning: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from filth and foul creatures.
context: Recite before entering a toilet, restroom, or similar private place; seeking Allah's protection is a sunnah.
keywords: toilet restroom wc bathroom washroom entering hygiene

name: Ghufranaka
meaning: I ask Your forgiveness.
context: Recite when leaving the toilet or restroom; asking for forgiveness is proper etiquette.
keywords: toilet restroom wc leaving forgiveness

name: Allahumma inni as'aluka khayral-mawliji wa khayral-makhraji
meaning: O Allah, I ask You for the good of entering and the good of leaving.
context: Recite when entering home, work, or as a guest through the door; asking good for entry and exit is a sunnah.
keywords: home door entering guest workplace

name: Bismillah
meaning: In the name of Allah.
context: Recite before eating; beginning with the basmala is for blessing and gratitude.
keywords: food meal eating before start bismillah

name: Alhamdulillahil-ladhi at'amana wa saqana
meaning: Praise be to Allah who fed us and gave us drink.
context: Recite after finishing a meal; thanking Allah who provided food and drink is a sunnah.
keywords: food meal after thanks gratitude hamd

name: Subhanalladhi sakhkhara lana hadha
meaning: Glory be to Him who subjected this to us.
context: Recite when boarding a ride or vehicle (car, bus, etc.); remembering Allah on a journey is recommended.
keywords: vehicle car bus travel journey ride transport

name: Bismika Allahumma ahya wa amut
meaning: In Your name, O Allah, I live and die (sleep).
context: Recite when lying down to sleep; entrusting the night to Allah is a sunnah.
keywords: sleep bed night before sleeping

name: Alhamdulillahil-ladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushur
meaning: Praise be to Allah who gave us life after death-like sleep; to Him is the return.
context: Recite when waking up in the morning; gratitude for sleep and starting the day with Allah.
keywords: morning wake up waking gratitude sleep

name: Bismillahi tawakkaltu 'alallahi la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah
meaning: In the name of Allah; I rely on Allah; there is no power except with Allah.
context: Recite when leaving home, work, or a safe place; relying on Allah for the road and daily affairs.
keywords: leaving home door work travel tawakkul daily

name: Alhamdulillahil-ladhi kasani hadha wa ma kunna muqtadirin
meaning: Praise be to Allah who clothed me with this though I was unable to do it.
context: Recite when wearing new clothes or a garment; gratitude for the blessing and mindfulness against waste.
keywords: clothes clothing new garment dress wearing

name: Allahumma kama hassanta khalqi fahassin khuluqi
meaning: O Allah, as You made my form beautiful, make my character beautiful.
context: Recite when looking in a mirror; gratitude for one's appearance and asking for good character.
keywords: mirror reflection face character gratitude

name: Allahummaftah li abwaba rahmatik
meaning: O Allah, open for me the doors of Your mercy.
context: Recite when entering a mosque; with respect for the place of worship and hope in Allah's mercy.
keywords: mosque masjid entering prayer worship

name: Allahumma inni as'aluka min fadlik
meaning: O Allah, I ask You of Your bounty.
context: Recite when leaving a mosque; asking for goodness and forgiveness after worship.
keywords: mosque masjid leaving prayer

name: Assalamu 'alaykum ahla di-yarin minal-mu'minina wal-muslimin
meaning: Peace be upon you, O people of this abode, believers and Muslims.
context: Recite when entering a graveyard; greeting the deceased and remembering the hereafter.
keywords: grave cemetery burial death visit hereafter

name: Na'udhu billahi min sharri hadha wa min sharri ma fihi
meaning: I seek refuge in Allah from the evil of this and what it contains.
context: Recite after waking from a disturbing dream; seeking refuge in Allah from evil.
keywords: dream nightmare sleep fear refuge

name: Inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji'un. Allahumma'jurni fi musibati wa-khluf li khayran minha
meaning: We belong to Allah and to Him we return. O Allah, reward me in my affliction and replace it with something better.
context: Recite upon hearing of death or a great loss; patience and asking reward and good outcome (verse and supplication together).
keywords: death loss grief patience calamity condolence

name: Allahumma asqina ghaythan nafi'an
meaning: O Allah, send down upon us a beneficial rain.
context: Recite when rain is needed; traditionally made facing the qibla when asking for beneficial rain (according to sunnah etiquette).
keywords: rain drought prayer istisqa water farm

name: Allahumma sayyiban mubarakan
meaning: O Allah, send upon us a blessed rain.
context: Recite when rain begins to fall; gratitude for the blessing and asking for barakah.
keywords: rain falling sky gratitude blessing

name: La ilaha illa Anta Subhanaka inni kuntu minaz-zalimin
meaning: There is no god but You; glory be to You; I was among the wrongdoers.
context: Recite in distress, fear, or hopelessness; the supplication of Yunus (peace be upon him) to turn the heart to Allah.
keywords: distress hardship fear anxiety hope prophet yunus

name: Rabbi zidni 'ilman nafi'an wa fahman wasi'an
meaning: My Lord, increase me in beneficial knowledge and broad understanding.
context: Recite before study, Qur'an reading, or beginning work; asking for beneficial knowledge and understanding.
keywords: knowledge study school quran learning wisdom

name: Subhanallahi wa bihamdihi
meaning: Glory and praise be to Allah.

name: Hasbunallahu wa ni'mal-wakil
meaning: Allah is sufficient for us; what an excellent Guardian He is.

name: Alhamdulillah
meaning: All praise is for Allah.

name: La ilaha illallah
meaning: There is no god but Allah.

name: Allahu Akbar
meaning: Allah is the Greatest.

name: Subhanallah
meaning: Glory be to Allah.

name: La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah
meaning: There is no power and no strength except with Allah.

name: Astaghfirullah
meaning: I seek forgiveness from Allah.

name: Allahumma salli 'ala Muhammad
meaning: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad.

name: Allahumma barik 'ala Muhammad
meaning: O Allah, bless Muhammad.

name: Subhanallahil-'Azim wa bihamdih
meaning: Glory be to Allah, the Magnificent, and praise be to Him.

name: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah
meaning: There is no god but Allah alone, without partner; to Him belongs dominion and praise; He is over all things capable.

name: Hasbiyallahu la ilaha illa huwa
meaning: Allah is sufficient for me; there is no god but He; in Him I have placed my trust.

name: Rabbi-ghfir warham
meaning: My Lord, forgive and have mercy; You are the best of those who show mercy.

name: Ya Hayyu ya Qayyum
meaning: O Ever-Living, O Self-Sustaining.

name: Subhanallahi wa bihamdihi Subhanallahil-'Azim
meaning: Glory be to Allah and praise be to Him; glory be to Allah, the Magnificent.

name: Raditu billahi Rabban wa bil-Islami dinan wa bi-Muhammadin nabiyya
meaning: I am pleased with Allah as Lord, Islam as religion, and Muhammad as Prophet.

name: Allahumma Antas-Salam
meaning: O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace; blessed are You, Owner of majesty and honor.

name: La ilaha illallah (mulk, hayat, qudrah)
meaning: (Full supplication of tawhid with dominion, life, death, and power over all things.)

name: Subhanallahi wa bihamdihi 'adada khalqihi
meaning: Glory and praise be to Allah as much as the number of His creation, as pleases Him, as the weight of His Throne, and as the ink of His words.

name: La ilaha illallahu'l-Malikul-Haqqul-Mubin
meaning: There is no god but Allah, the King, the Truth, the Clear.
